description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push and pull request. Use a matrix strategy to build on multiple Windows environments with different configurations, and a separate job on ubuntu-latest for fuzzing. For each Windows job, set up the environment, checkout repositories, build and copy libsodium if required, checkout libzmq, create a build directory, and build libzmq using cmake. For the fuzzing job, build fuzzers using google/oss-fuzz/infra/cifuzz.
